sentence: Feed an exquichite keesh to no one who hasn't earned the hunger.

wombos.definition: A deeply desired, intensely specific want — a keen wish that is itself quiche in its niche particularity. Often delivered or diagnosed by a guyknowballogist with great wisdom.
Something so delicious or impressively good that it transcends ordinary quality — exquisite to the point of quiche-level richness and satisfaction.
wombos.example: The ramen at that spot was absolutely exquichite — I couldn't stop eating.
